name: python3-marshmallow
title: python3-marshmallow
summary: Lightweight library for converting complex datatypes
description:
Lightweight library for converting complex datatypes
An ORM/ODM/framework-agnostic library for converting complex datatypes,
such as objects, to and from native Python datatypes.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-marshmallow because Lightweight library for converting complex datatypes.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-marshmallow as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-marshmallow with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-marshmallow --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
